2606.28524.title: Developmental Trajectories of Situation Modeling and Mentalizing in Transformer Language Models
2606.28524.paper_summary: Recent work suggests that Large Language Models (LLMs) are sensitive to the belief states of agents described by text, as measured by the false belief task (FBT), yet persistent concerns of construct validity remain. We adopt a **developmental perspective**, tracing the pattern of mental state reasoning behavior -- and likely **preconditions** for this behavior -- across multiple training stages in the Olmo2 and Pythia language model suites. We find that above-chance FBT performance depends both on model size and sufficient training volume, emerges relatively late in pretraining, and is most improved by post-training interventions (SFT, DPO) in the condition most diagnostic of mentalizing (False Belief, Implicit). However, FBT performance is fragile: consistent with past work, the use of non-factive verbs (e.g., thinks) increases false belief attributions even in the True Belief condition. To contextualize these findings, we track the emergence of **situation modeling**: the ability to report on basic factual properties of a described scene. Situation modeling accuracy generally precedes and exceeds FBT accuracy, yet situational representations also prove surprisingly incoherent in certain respects: when asked about the knowledge states of the Antagonist agent -- who always knows the item's true location -- Olmo2 13b is consistently influenced both by the Target agent's knowledge state and the presence of non-factive verbs. Together, these results suggest that larger, sufficiently trained models build partially coherent situation models in a developmentally appropriate sequence, yet display surprising fragility -- highlighting the value of developmental and stress-testing approaches for evaluating LLM capabilities.
2606.28524.paper_summary_zh: 最近的研究表明，大型語言模型（LLMs）對文本描述的代理人的信念狀態敏感，這一點通過虛假信念任務（FBT）來測量，但對於構建效度的持續擔憂仍然存在。我們採取**發展的視角**，追踪Olmo2和Pythia語言模型套件中多個訓練階段的心理狀態推理行為的模式——以及這種行為的可能**前提條件**。我們發現，超過隨機機率的FBT表現既依賴於模型大小，也依賴於足夠的訓練量，並且在預訓練中相對較晚出現，最受後訓練干預（SFT，DPO）的改善，尤其是在最能診斷心理化的條件下（虛假信念，隱性）。然而，FBT表現是脆弱的：與過去的研究一致，使用非事實性動詞（例如，認為）即使在真實信念條件下也會增加虛假信念的歸因。為了使這些發現具體化，我們追踪**情境建模**的出現：報告描述場景的基本事實屬性的能力。情境建模的準確性通常先於並超過FBT的準確性，但在某些方面情境表徵也顯得驚人地不一致：當被詢問對手代理人的知識狀態時——對手代理人總是知道物品的真實位置——Olmo2 13b始終受到目標代理人知識狀態和非事實性動詞存在的影響。綜合來看，這些結果表明，較大且經過充分訓練的模型在發展上適當的序列中構建部分一致的情境模型，但顯示出驚人的脆弱性——突顯了發展和壓力測試方法在評估LLM能力方面的價值。
2606.28524.author: Pamela D. Rivière et.al.
2606.28524.authors: Pamela D. Rivière, Cameron Jones, Sean Trott
